classic-tarot-v1.description: 1900s mystical lithography with bold ink outlines and anthropomorphic leopard cat characters.
classic-tarot-v1.technical_prefix: [TECHNICAL: Aspect Ratio 2:3 Vertical, Single Unified Scene]
classic-tarot-v1.style_baseline: Traditional mystical tarot card illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines and Art Nouveau accents.
classic-tarot-v1.character_baseline: The subject is an anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs. Essential features: prominent white spots on the back of rounded black ears, two white forehead stripes, and intricate leopard cat rosette spots on its fur.
classic-tarot-v1.composition_baseline: Center-weighted character. Ensure significant empty atmospheric background at the top 15% and bottom 15% for title and text overlays.

poker-card-v1.description: Modern flat comic style for playing cards (Future placeholder).
